tasks.name: Start booking the cheapest garden-view room with breakfast for a June weekend stay
tasks.description: For a stay from Friday June 12, 2026 to Sunday June 14, 2026 for 2 adults, find garden-view rooms that include breakfast, sort by price low to high, and begin booking the cheapest available option until the payment step.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Rooms' or 'Rooms & Suites'.
Open the date picker on the rooms search panel and select check-in as Friday June 12, 2026 and check-out as Sunday June 14, 2026, then set the guest count to 2 adults and 0 children.
Open the filters panel, select 'View' and choose 'Garden view', then in the amenities section select the checkbox for 'Breakfast included'.
In the sort dropdown above the room results, select the option 'Price: Low to High'.
Click on the first room card displayed in the sorted results list (the cheapest garden-view room with breakfast).
On the room details page, scroll to the rate options section and select the rate with the lowest price per night listed for the selected dates.
Click the 'Book Now' or 'Continue' button associated with the selected lowest-price rate.

On the booking details form, fill in the required guest fields using sample data (e.g., first name 'Jamie', last name 'Taylor', email 'jamie.taylor@example.com', phone '5551234567', and arrival time '15:00').
Click the button labeled 'Continue to Payment' or similar to proceed to the payment step for this cheapest garden-view room with breakfast.

tasks.name: Make a dinner reservation for four at the earliest available time between 7:00–8:00 PM
tasks.description: Create a restaurant reservation for 4 guests on a specific date, choosing the earliest available time slot between 7:00 PM and 8:00 PM, with indoor seating and a window-table preference, and submit the reservation request.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Restaurant' or 'Dining'.
Click the button or tab labeled 'Reserve a Table' or 'Book a Table'.
In the reservation form, select a date two weeks from today’s date (e.g., if today is March 3, 2026, select March 17, 2026) and set the party size to 4 guests.
Open the time dropdown and choose the earliest available time shown between 7:00 PM and 8:00 PM (if multiple times are listed, choose the earliest in that range).
In the seating preference section, select 'Indoor' and choose the 'Window table' option if it is available.
Fill in the contact fields with sample data (e.g., name 'Morgan Lee', email 'morgan.lee@example.com', phone '5559876543').
In the special requests or notes field, type 'One vegetarian guest; please seat away from the kitchen door.'.
Click the button labeled 'Confirm Reservation', 'Request Reservation', or similar to submit the dinner reservation for four at the chosen time.

tasks.name: Start booking the highest-rated spa package under $400 per night for a 2-night stay
tasks.description: Find special offers that include spa access and late checkout for 2 adults, filter to options priced at $400 or less per night, sort by guest rating, and begin booking the highest-rated package for a 2-night stay.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Offers', 'Packages', or 'Specials'.
In the offers filters, select amenity or feature options for both 'Spa access' and 'Late checkout'.
Use the price filter controls to set the maximum nightly rate to $400 (leave the minimum at $0 or the default).
Use the sort dropdown to choose 'Guest Rating: High to Low' or a similar rating-based sorting option.

From the sorted list of offers that meet the criteria, click on the first package card that shows a nightly rate of $400 or less and mentions spa-related benefits in its title or tag (e.g., 'Spa Escape', 'Wellness Retreat').
On the selected package page, use the date picker to choose a 2-night stay starting on a Friday next month (e.g., check-in Friday April 10, 2026 and check-out Sunday April 12, 2026) for 2 adults.
Click the button labeled 'Check Availability', 'Select Room', or similar to view room options that include this package.
From the room options associated with this package, click on the first room card listed that is available for the chosen dates.
Click the 'Book Package' or 'Continue' button to move to the booking details step for this highest-rated spa package under $400 per night.

tasks.name: Purchase a $150 restaurant gift card for email delivery to a friend
tasks.description: Navigate to the gift card section, configure a digital gift card of exactly $150 for restaurant use with email delivery to a specified recipient, and proceed to the checkout step.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Gift Cards' or 'Vouchers'.
On the gift cards page, select the option for a restaurant or dining gift card if there are multiple gift card types.
Enter '150' in the custom amount field or select the $150 preset option if available.
Choose 'Email delivery' or 'Digital delivery' as the delivery method.
Fill in the recipient details fields with sample information (e.g., recipient name 'Alex Green' and recipient email 'alex.green@example.com') and set the send date to one week from today’s date.
In the personal message field, type 'Enjoy a special dinner on me at this hotel restaurant. Happy Birthday!'.
Fill in the purchaser details with sample information (e.g., name 'Taylor Brooks' and email 'taylor.brooks@example.com').
Click the button labeled 'Add to Cart', 'Buy Gift Card', or similar to add the $150 email gift card and then click 'Proceed to Checkout' to move to the checkout step.

tasks.name: Submit an inquiry for a corporate meeting for 20 people with specific amenities
tasks.description: Use the events or meetings section to request a quote for a half-day corporate meeting for 20 attendees, specifying date, time, and required amenities like a projector and coffee service, and submit the inquiry form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Meetings & Events', 'Events', or 'Business'.
Click the button or link labeled 'Request Proposal', 'Plan an Event', or 'Inquiry Form'.
In the event type dropdown, select 'Corporate meeting' or the closest available business-related option.
Enter '20' as the number of attendees and choose a date exactly one month from today’s date with a start time of 9:00 AM and an end time of 1:00 PM.
In the amenities or requirements checklist, select options for 'Projector', 'Screen', and 'Coffee break' or 'Refreshments' if these are available.
Fill in the contact information fields with sample data (e.g., company name 'North Shore Consulting', contact name 'Jordan Smith', email 'jordan.smith@example.com', phone '5552223344').
In the comments or additional details field, type 'Please include pricing for a light vegetarian snack option and Wi-Fi access for all 20 attendees.'.
Click the button labeled 'Submit Inquiry', 'Send Request', or similar to send the corporate meeting request.

tasks.name: Build a vegetarian dinner plan with 1 appetizer, 2 mains, and 1 dessert under set price limits
tasks.description: Using the restaurant dinner menu, filter for vegetarian dishes and add exactly 1 appetizer (under $15), 2 main courses (each under $30), and 1 dessert (under $12) to a selection list or planner.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Restaurant' or 'Dining'.
Click on the 'Menu' or 'Dinner Menu' section.
Use menu filters to select 'Dinner' as the meal and apply a 'Vegetarian' filter or category if available.
In the appetizers section, scroll if needed and click the 'Add', 'Select', or similar button for the first vegetarian appetizer shown with a listed price below $15.

In the main courses or entrées section, click the 'Add' or equivalent button for the first two vegetarian mains that each show a listed price below $30 (selecting the first two that meet this condition from top to bottom).
In the desserts section, click the 'Add' or similar button for the first vegetarian dessert with a price below $12.
Click on the 'Your Selections', 'Order Plan', 'Saved Items', or similar icon or link to open the panel or page showing the selected dishes.
On the selections panel or page, click the 'Save Plan', 'Keep for Reservation', or similar button to store this vegetarian dinner plan of 1 appetizer, 2 mains, and 1 dessert.

tasks.name: Choose a room with the largest bed under $250 per night for a solo business stay
tasks.description: For a 3-night weekday stay for 1 adult, find rooms priced under $250 per night, compare at least three options, and select the room with the largest bed size to proceed to its booking page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'Rooms' or 'Rooms & Suites'.

Open the date picker in the rooms search panel and select a 3-night stay from Monday to Thursday in the same week next month (e.g., check-in Monday May 4, 2026 and check-out Thursday May 7, 2026) with 1 adult and 0 children.
Use the price filter to set the maximum nightly rate to $250, leaving the minimum at its default.
From the filtered room results, select the 'Compare' checkbox or similar comparison toggle for the first three room options listed that are priced under $250 per night.
Click on the 'Compare Rooms' button or link to open the comparison view for the selected three rooms.

In the comparison table, identify the room with the largest listed bed type (e.g., prefer 'King' over 'Queen' over 'Double'; if two rooms have the same largest bed size, choose the one with the lower nightly price).
In the comparison view, click the 'View Room' or room name link for the room that matches this largest-bed selection under $250 per night.
On that room's detail page, click the 'Book Now', 'Select Room', or similar button to proceed to the booking step for this chosen room.

tasks.name: Sign up for the hotel newsletter with specific interest preferences and monthly frequency
tasks.description: Access the newsletter sign-up form, subscribe with an email address, select interests in room offers and restaurant events, choose a monthly email frequency, and submit the form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Scroll to the footer or locate the 'Newsletter' or 'Stay Updated' section and click its 'Sign Up' link or button.
In the email field, type 'guest.subscriber@example.com'.
In the interests or preferences checklist, select at least 'Room offers' and 'Restaurant events' (leave any other categories unselected).
If a frequency dropdown is available, select 'Monthly' as the preferred email frequency.
In the name field, enter 'Guest Subscriber' or similar sample name.
Check any required consent or privacy policy checkbox related to receiving marketing emails.
Click the button labeled 'Subscribe', 'Sign Up', or similar to complete the newsletter subscription with the selected preferences.
